## 📋 Summary

The patient presents for a follow-up post-appendectomy and reports localized abdominal discomfort. No fever, chills, or signs of infection are noted. Clinician observes normal vitals and mild tenderness in the right lower quadrant. Assessment is consistent with expected post-operative healing. No urgent complications suspected.

**O – Objective**
